profile_summary: Leisure traveler (mid-high budget) prioritizing spa & wellness, beach access.

recommendations.justification: Casa Harbour, Istanbul ranks #1 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.92), beach access (+0.88), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed."

supporting_evidence.quote: Wonderful wellness facilities; the sauna and treatments left us completely refreshed.
Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect.
The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.

recommendations.justification: The Royal Sands, Rome ranks #2 for this traveler on spa & wellness (+0.88), beach access (+0.88), weighted by what matters most to them. Guests note: "The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool."

supporting_evidence.quote: The spa was a highlight — incredible massages and a serene relaxation pool.
Woke up to the sea every morning — the beachfront setting was perfect.
Direct beach access made the whole stay feel like a proper getaway.
